chapter_title.ar: باب أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ عَلَى الْحُلِيِّ وَ سَبَائِكِ الذَّهَبِ وَ نُقَرِ الْفِضَّةِ وَ الْجَوْهَرِ زَكَاةٌ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 10 – There is no Zakāt upon the ornaments, and the gold alloys, and the silver carvings and the jewels

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/36)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/36)
text: لَيْسَ فِي التِّبْرِ زَكَاةٌ إِنَّمَا هِيَ عَلَى الدَّنَانِيرِ وَ الدَّرَاهِمِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Hadeed, from Jameel, from one of our companions that,
‘Heasws said: ‘There is no Zakāt upon the gold dust. But rather it (Zakāt) is upon the Dinars and the Dirhams’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn Hadid from Jamil from certain persons of our people who have said the following: “Zakat is not due on gold. Zakat becomes due only on dinars and dirhams.”
